description_for_human: Backs the Eurozone Analyst declarative agent with a remote MCP server.

functions.name: openCopilotStudioChat
functions.description: Open the Eurozone Analyst chat surface to answer the user. This is the only way to answer questions about Euro-area economics, member-state data, ECB policy, scenarios, comparisons, charts, or reports. Pass the user's message as the userQuery argument so the analyst can start answering immediately. The response is a chat widget that owns the reply; do not write any additional text.
